footer.aboutText: We specialize in providing the finest furniture pieces designed by experts to make your home a unique space that reflects your refined taste.

faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our products, shipping, and policies.
faq.a1: We offer a 30-day return policy on all items. Products must be unused and in original packaging. Simply contact our support team to initiate a return, and we will provide you with a prepaid shipping label.
faq.a2: Yes, we ship to most countries worldwide. International shipping times and costs vary based on location. You will see the exact shipping cost at checkout before finalizing your order.
faq.q3: How can I track my order?
faq.a3: Once your order ships, you will receive a tracking number via email. You can use this number to monitor your package in real-time on the carrier website.
faq.q4: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a4: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), PayPal, and other digital payment methods for your convenience and security.
faq.a5: Standard shipping typically takes 5-7 business days. Express options are available at checkout for 2-3 business days, or overnight delivery for 1 business day.
faq.q6: Can I modify or cancel my order?
faq.a6: Orders can be modified or cancelled within 24 hours of purchase. Please contact our support team immediately with your order number to request changes.
faq.contactSupport: Our support team is here to help. Contact us for any additional questions.

shipping.subtitle: Fast, reliable shipping options for your peace of mind.
shipping.trackingDesc: Once your order ships, you will receive a tracking number via email. Use this number to monitor your package in real-time on the carrier website.
shipping.addressDesc: Please ensure your delivery address is correct at checkout. We cannot be responsible for packages delivered to incorrect addresses.
shipping.signatureDesc: For high-value items, signature may be required upon delivery. Our courier will attempt delivery multiple times if you are not available.
shipping.packagingDesc: All items are carefully packaged to ensure safe delivery. We use high-quality materials and secure packaging methods to protect your purchase during transit.
shipping.insuranceDesc: Your package is covered by shipping insurance. In the unlikely event of damage or loss, we will work with the carrier to resolve the issue promptly.
shipping.processStep1Desc: Your order is received and confirmed. You will receive a confirmation email with order details.
shipping.processStep2Desc: We carefully pack your items and prepare them for shipment within 24-48 hours.
shipping.processStep3Desc: Your package is shipped and you receive a tracking number via email to monitor delivery.
shipping.processStep4Desc: Your order arrives at your doorstep. We ensure safe delivery and provide delivery confirmation.
shipping.checkFAQ: Check our FAQ section for more detailed answers about shipping, returns, and policies.
shipping.contactSupport: Contact our support team for any shipping inquiries or concerns.

returns.subtitle: We want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase. Here is how our return process works.
returns.windowDesc: Return items within 30 days of purchase for a full refund or exchange.
returns.conditionDesc: Items must be unused, unworn, and in original packaging with all tags attached.
returns.processDesc: Contact us to receive a prepaid return label. Ship the item back at no cost.
returns.refundDesc: Once received and inspected, refunds are processed within 5-7 business days.
returns.exclude1: Items purchased more than 30 days ago
returns.exclude3: Items without original tags or packaging
returns.refundMethodsDesc: Refunds are issued to the original payment method. Credit card refunds may take an additional 1-2 billing cycles to appear on your account.
returns.exchangesDesc: Need a different size or color? We offer free exchanges within 30 days. Simply contact us with your order details.
returns.step1Desc: Reach out to our support team with your order number and reason for return.
returns.step2Desc: We will provide you with a prepaid return shipping label via email.
returns.step3Desc: Pack your item securely and ship it using the provided label at no cost.
returns.step4Desc: Once received and inspected, we will process your refund within 5-7 business days.
returns.contactSupport: Contact our support team to initiate your return process.
